rulings.Case Title: ARMANDO CASTILLO VS. SALVADOR PALACIO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 12, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT SALVADOR PALACIO, MACARIO RAMIREZ MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Stay of Proceedings on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: HEATHER GREGG VS. JAMES J. CUNNINGHAM ET AL

rulings.Case Title: SAHU FAMILY TRUST DATED 10/15/07 VS. KARENA A. FENG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Stay All Writs Of Execution; Execution Of The Judgment During Pendency Of The Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 12, 2023 line 7. DEFENDANT KARENA FENG Motion For Stay All Writs Of Execution; Execution Of The Judgment During Pendency Of The Appeal is DENIED. Defendant failed to explain how she would suffer "extreme hardship" in the absence of a stay. (CCP 1176(a).)=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SAHU FAMILY TRUST DATED 10/15/07 VS. KARENA A. FENG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 12, 2023 line 7. DEFENDANT KARENA FENG APPLICATION TO PREVENT FORFEITURE DUE TO COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT is DENIED. Complaint is based on a Notice demanding rent that became due on or after March 31, 2022, which is outside the applicable time period of March 1, 2020 through March 31, 2022.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
